payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Or yeah, sorry, $3, not 3%. Much better than 3%. I'm so stupid. $3. It's awesome. Thank you, Loot Crate! Next announcement we have, for those who missed it previously, it is now available: the latest issue of Rat Queens, in which Vox Machina make a cameo appearance during a certain bar-crawl portion of the issue. And some wayward bard ends up trying to buy a drink for one of the members.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Should be fun. All right. Also, we put the new full title intro on Facebook yesterday, so you guys can get it in hi-def glory at your request. And we've already hit a million views on it in a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And then now the crit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought you said the first one was a crit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what you said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And then I thought differently but I didn't say it out loud, but because you're calling me on it, I'll let it happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you saying what's in your head is different than what's in my head?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That was double sixes. So that's 22 plus eight is 30, so 15 points of slashing damage. On all those strikes against you. Pike? Two attacks on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You still alive there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a natural 20. And that's 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, so. That is a one and two, so that's three, six plus eight, you take 14 points of slashing damage from this barbarian female who's all up on your grill.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I hate this bitch!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, you have Warcaster, so you have advantage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: This is so fucking stressful!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That brings us back to the top of the initiative order. Vex, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What, they just approached me, they didn't attack me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, there was the one guy that got up there with movement. Thank you for the reminder. So before that happens, actually, reminder, this one did have enough movement to get up there and still get attacks off on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, he's attacking Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, he's attacking me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's going to be a 13 with the first strike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misses, second one's going to be a 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That just hits. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that's going to be 17 points of slashing damage from that greatsword, whoosh. I need you to go ahead and make a concentration check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You streak off as all these blades hammer into your side, cutting the bottom of your feet, one of them hits you in the back of the neck and curves across your lower back, and as you pull away clutching it, you look at your hand with the blood pooling in the middle of your palm, and you look at the gem with a faint glimmer of a form of a human inside the gem that's currently mingling with all the blood that's smeared across your body, as all of a sudden you coast around, through the air, the wind whirling past you, and you spin around towards the top of the Margrave's estate. And you can hear the blood in your body-- (heartbeat sounds)-- in your ears as you start getting a little dizzy and realizing just how rough you are at the moment from that exchange.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right, she gave me a blessing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's Aid, you have 15 extra hit points. So that's what it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was the armor class goes up one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I got 15 extra hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Aid just gives you guys extra hit points. So anyway. 17. Doesn't hit. All right. So three more attacks. That was cocked. 19?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's my armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, 26?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck. Balls. Shit. Mother bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And that's 19 again. So four attacks hit you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First one is for 14 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Next one, hoo, that's eight, 12 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doubled. Halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Stop it! Don't be helpful!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine plus four-- another 13 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dammit. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the last one. That's going to be 15 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great, cool, great. I'm fine and I'm just going to keep going.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That ends your turn. It's now the archers' turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Any movement I have left, I want to use to run up to the other side of the wall that Keyleth is on. If I have enough, I'll climb up, if not, I'll go behind that barrel. But if I, before I go, quietly I say to Kevdak, your fate is sealed here today, my friend.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. He does not get an attack of opportunity on you because he is paralyzed, and the guy already took one against you so he already used his reaction, you rush past him. You do not have enough movement to get to the top, but you do get to the corner right where the barrel is. Okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. He continues to rage if he's taken damage since the last round. He's taken a lot of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Greenbeard is now going to go ahead and back behind here, trying to get behind the tree as he now notices he's in the open.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Burn him up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Done his business in that moment. No, as a bonus action, he's going to go ahead and turn into an earth elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who is?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Greenbeard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking druids! Fucking druids!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Kill him! Kill him, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Everything just flipped.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now. Percy, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kill Kevdak.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was going to say, I can't kill Kevdak, he just healed for--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kevdak was on the cusp.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But now he has 70 extra hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He does.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He heals 70 extra hit points? Oh, not 70 percent of his hit points? We can still take him, we can still take him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, seven hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 140. We have to hit him for 140.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He healed him 70 hit points. Is he still raging, though?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: But then that's gone up since you leveled previously.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'd say it's your bonus action to do it, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, Grog, you were released, falling down to land on top of Kevdak with the bloodaxe in a downward arc.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And a big windup as we're coming down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Any chance I can make this reckless?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! Then they all get advantages against you again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, thank god for that. Natural. 20. Look at it. The first one was a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Fuck you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ones and twenties, man, you got to stop this. And that's why he did reckless. (screaming and cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so go ahead and roll damage on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Get 'im, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean he gets the three 12s again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the Brutal Critical at this level, how many extra dice is it for you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Brutal Critical is one additional damage die during critical hits.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. So. At this point in time, you watch as Greenbeard's form shrinks down and shifts back into his goliath form, still busted, he's looking down at the destroyed, crumpled body of Kevdak, and you there on the ground as well, looking up at you above and hovering. He looks over at the other goliaths nearby here that are rushing in, and they all step out and backwards, inspecting this body. There's a pause, a moment of pause. But they've all paid attention to what you said. That ends your turn. It is now the archers' turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's an action to feed a potion to anyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you going to do, Vex? Hurry up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hold my action until Grog is healed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I-- can I shout anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to shout, witness Grog Strongjaw, and bend the knee!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's great, it's great, it's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intimidation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20! (yelling and cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit the table, I was going to go inspect it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I hit, I hit, but it was, it was a 20, I swear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, I trust you guys. I trust you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all ones and twenties. We have these two-sided dice. Just a one and a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be an interesting night to explain to the internet, guys. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You opened it up to the dice, and the dice decided.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We witnessed, we witnessed.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "You saved us narrowly being executed, Grog." And he stands up and gets to the front of all the rest of the Herd there. "Call forth the rest of our people. We do not leave this town yet. We claim Westruun home for one more night. For it is tomorrow at dawn, we slam our blades against the hide of a dragon."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I point Bigby's Hand like he was too. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As Bigby's hand points to Zanror, the two that are holding the chains move up and begin to unchain them both, taking the shackles off his hands and the female goliath at his side. Eventually he stands up, reaches over and puts his arm around her and says, "I am sorry, Worra."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Worra.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Worra. She stands and goes, "Do not be sorry. It seems we've been delivered from our judgment." She looks up towards you. You don't recognize her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's not from the original Herd.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Zanror, she is quite a beauty. Congratulations.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Takes an hour. So, as you guys take this time, this is a short rest for those of you who aren't part of this ritual. You complete the ritual. Go ahead and make a religion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you have anything that can heal the little boy or bring him back somehow, Pike? Key? Anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go and check the little boy. How bad is he? Is he beyond the point of return?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's done.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Could I--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Resurrect him or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have Raise Dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it turn him into a zombie, or does it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it just raises him from the dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah, do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll go over to the little boy and see if I can--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, this will take a while. All right. So, as the rest of herd move on, following Zanror, they begin to separate to gather the rest of the herd throughout the town. A few stay behind, keeping watch--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll assist Pike in any way that I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to sit and fix my gun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to cost-- 500 gold are consumed by the casting of this spell as part of the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll help.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the beautiful musical tones of the singing come to a close, your holy symbol, the glow fades, and a moment passes before you hear the soft coughing of the child's throaty expulsion, himself taking in his next breath of air. He sits up, cradling his head. "What happened?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Go ahead and make a straight wisdom roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I assist?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How would you like to assist?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would like to come over and start listening to the chanting that she's doing in Celestial and harmonize and bring a voice to it since I can actually speak Celestial.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a performance check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Performance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's lovely.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you finish the ritual, both the voices of Pike and Percy begin to harmonize across these various refrains in a language that, especially when spoken in this rhythmic, ritualistic way, it seems to almost create a third voice. And then you hear, clearly, there is a third voice harmonizing with them that you don't know where it's coming from.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's me. I'm off here in the corner. (sings scat)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Anybody else doing anything for the short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, everything went by so fast. They tried to pull them out, but they found me and pulled me out and brought me here. That's all. There was a fight and a lot of yelling. That's all I remember."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Where do you live?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Up by the temples."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, we'll help you find your family. And maybe while we're there we can see if your grandfather's around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He smiles a little bit. You can still see the dried blood streaks across his face, but you can see past that to the smile that peeks through beneath his dirty face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I lift him up and put him on Trinket so we can start walking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. He laughs and Trinket licks him and takes some of that off and he is excited to be grasping something, although he slides a couple times. You can see he's weak from the remnants of the resurrection spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I give him a boost.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Very well. These two stay, though. No offense, but you did just kill one of my friends naught but an hour ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll stoke it, and then put the bodies on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you take the bodies of the dead villagers that had been lost in the battle and the handful of the other combatants that had fallen, and you throw them onto the fire and it crackles and burns over time. The smell of burning bodies fills the space around it for a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have a house to procure some items from. And a conversation to have with Zanror at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time of day is it now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are there any other goliaths in the square that are lingering?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are three lingering that are keeping an eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I walk over to one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tonight we prepare for an incredible battle. Go. Release any meager prisoners you may have kept. They will do nothing for our fight.

payload.raw_text: No. Doesn't seem to be anything holding you there other than the ritual that was done. When the ritual's completed, you're welcome to go about what you're doing. At which point you do see as time has passed, a few people start poking through windows, who apparently were either hiding in some of these buildings, and see you guys and check out and then go back into hiding again. The town still has people living throughout it. Many of them stay hidden whenever things move in their vicinity.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Hm? We have a dragon who's going to go pick up a giant package of whatever we give him.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: We could make some interesting decisions on what's in that box.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I mean, do we have to stay in the square, or are we allowed to?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He can do four attacks in one round with the bloodaxe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Now we're going to have to have another huge conversation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We didn't die! I seriously thought we were all going to die. When he got healed and everything was running--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yup. Yup. I was like, we might as well make it cool, because we're dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We had it, then it flipped and it was gone. And then we snaked it outta the fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we had them on the run!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He, by the way, on that Hold Person, that Cutting Words/Hold Person. Like, that's exactly what that--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dude. Yes. Give it up for the fucking bard. Who has an article in Dear Vox Machina.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, appearing tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no. Kevdak hadn't used his action surge yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kevdak hadn't used his action surge yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Action surge? What does that do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Multi, it's what he does.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What I do, where he can take an extra action.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: When a creature misses him with a melee attack, he can use one of his superiority die to do a reaction attack as well. So he could in theory get five attacks in one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we had them on the run!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He, by the way, on that Hold Person, that Cutting Words/Hold Person. Like, that's exactly what that--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dude. Yes. Give it up for the fucking bard. Who has an article in Dear Vox Machina.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, appearing tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no. Kevdak hadn't used his action surge yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kevdak hadn't used his action surge yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Action surge? What does that do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Multi, it's what he does.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What I do, where he can take an extra action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He can do four attacks in one round with the bloodaxe.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did he ever get to attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Couldn't make his save. His arms were gone by the time he came around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, getting his arms off him, brilliant.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus, he had four more superiority die and the riposte ability. So he could--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is riposte?
